description.unified: Shoots 12 arrows to random enemies and deals a total of ??? P.DMG.
Upon attacking, summons 5 arrows that launch towards the enemy. Each arrow deals ??? P.DMG.

Fires an arrow in a straight line, dealing P.DMG to all enemies in range based on the target's remaining HP. Deals a maximum of ??? P.DMG and knocks down the target. Against Bosses, deals additional ??? P.DMG that ignores DEF.
Upon attacking, increases ATK by ??? and Crit Chance by [80->100] for [7 sec->10 sec]. This effect stacks up to [6->3] times.

dark.unified: There is a 50% chance to inflict Stun for [0.5 sec->1 sec].

light.unified: Ignores DEF when there is only 1 enemy.

dark.unified: At the beginning of each battle, increases ATK. This effect stacks up to max 10 times, and upon reaching 10 stacks, increases DMG dealt to bosses by 20%. This effect is irremovable.

description.unified: [Moonlight Flash] DMG is increased by {0}% and target takes 20% additional P.DMG for 10 sec.
[Moonlight Arrow] Increases ATK Spd by [(added) 100] and each stack increases DMG to Non-Hero enemies by {0}%.

dark.unified: Own Crit Chance is decreased by 300 and Crit DMG is increased by [70%->150%].

description.unified: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by {0} for 10 sec, and for the duration of skill, each auto attack fires an arrow that deals extra {1}% P.DMG.

Summons the soul of Green Winds, Notos for 13 sec, increasing own ATK by [45%->50%] and Crit DMG by [(added) 50%]. For the duration of Skill, deals ??? P.DMG that ignores DEF on an enemy every 4 sec, knocking them back for [1 sec->2 sec], and immediately reducing the Cooldown of own Skills by 1 sec.

1.to: Increases DMG by 50%, and every time the Soul attacks an enemy, recovers own Mana by 1000.
1.unified: Increases DMG by 50%, and every time the Soul attacks an enemy, recovers own Mana by 1000.

2.from: Increases DMG by 25% and reduces activation requirement to 45 times.
2.to: Increases DMG by 30% and reduces Skill Activation requirements to 40 times.
2.unified: Increases DMG by [25%->30%] and reduces Skill Activation requirements to [45->40] times.
